FROM

 (

 minus
 select CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = STG_CG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES)
